title: Complex Narrative Simplification
description: Both Design and Global themes are wrestling with unifying non-linear narratives into a single pitch. Design must unify 8 disciplines/paths, while Global must merge Honors and Int'l Education.

title: Interdisciplinary Focus
description: Cross-disciplinary flexibility is emerging as a core strength across multiple groups (e.g., Design's 8 disciplines, Health's Neurodiversity Initiative).
